name: Cala Morell
description: A natural harbour-cove tucked between reddish cliffs amid a development of whitewashed, Cycladic-style houses. Beside it lies the prehistoric Cala Morell necropolis (around 14 caves), pairing a swim with Talayotic culture.

highlights: the cove-harbour among reddish cliffs and white Cycladic houses
visiting the prehistoric necropolis beside the development
